2026-05-26TCCanada Marine ActAppointment of a director of the Windsor Port AuthorityAppointment of Justin Falconer of Windsor, Ontario, to be a director of the Windsor Port Authority, to hold office for a term of three years.N/A
subject: Appointment of a director of the Windsor Port Authority
precis: Appointment of Justin Falconer of Windsor, Ontario, to be a director of the Windsor Port Authority, to hold office for a term of three years.
